---
title: "Getting Started with mobspain"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with mobspain}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup}
library(mobspain)
init_data_dir("~/spanish_mobility_data")
```

## Analyzing Madrid Commute Patterns
```{r madrid_commute}
# Get districts
districts <- get_spatial_zones("dist") %>%
  filter(grepl("Madrid", name))

# Get morning commute data
commute_data <- get_mobility_matrix(
  dates = c("2023-03-01", "2023-03-07"),
  level = "dist",
  time_window = c(7, 9)
) %>%
  filter(id_origin %in% districts$id, 
         id_destination %in% districts$id)

# Calculate containment
containment <- calculate_containment(commute_data)
head(containment)

# Visualize
plot_daily_mobility(commute_data)
create_flow_map(
  commute_data %>% group_by(id_origin, id_destination) %>% summarise(n_trips = sum(n_trips)),
  districts
)
```
